message:
🐛 Globally disable GPU compositing triggers in presentation mode (#799)

The previous fix (PR #797) only covered .glass in index.css, but 30+
components use backdrop-blur-sm Tailwind classes directly in JSX.
The Three.js globe also runs a continuous requestAnimationFrame loop.

This broadens the fix to disable ALL GPU compositing triggers:
- backdrop-filter: none on ALL elements (covers .glass + 30+ backdrop-blur-sm)
- will-change: auto on ALL elements (was forcing GPU layers)
- filter: none on weather cards
- box-shadow: none on status indicators
- canvas display: none (hides the Three.js globe animation loop)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
